limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts, preventing a score of 4 or 5 for ai_investment_intensity; the Payrailz acquisition price is referenced but not clearly broken out as AI-attributable in the excerpts shown.
